_note: Final composed tier (10 tasks, 7 repos, Python + Go), rebalanced 2026-07-01 after the first full artifact run (../vb-final-v2, $9.26) showed Sonnet 5 is run-to-run VOLATILE on the hardest anchors (aiohttp/star-cte/ilike: passed all 3 in morning screens, failed all 3 in the evening run). Composition: both-fail tail = flask-teardown-robust (Opus 0/4, Sonnet 0/4); Sonnet-only discriminator = qualify-lateral-star (0/5); volatile hard anchor = aiohttp-upgrade-deferred (Sonnet ~50% pass@1, strong steps/cost signal); stable anchors = iso8601-nanos (Sonnet 4/4), parser-tuple-subquery, click, chi (Go), more-itertools, packaging x2. Expected: Sonnet 70-80%, Opus 90%. Spares for rotation (validated, incl. the volatile hard anchors): star-cte-struct-shadow, star-ilike-rename, hive-json-roundtrip, resolver-flatten-recursion, unpivot-cte-star, explode-struct-resolve, poetry-extras-duplicate-conflict. Full 2-model repeat-1 run ~$9-14.
_veryhard_note: Very-hard tail: 5 CONFIRMED frontier-hard tasks (claude-fable-5 --effort low fails each; screened 2026-07-03/04). Three distinct hard sub-veins: (1) seed-dependent partition (leiden, implemented-and-graded-0 at 96 steps), (2) arbitrary internal naming (canonicalize), (3) convention-dense exact-output reproduction (pennylane trotter gate stream + selectcopy-qrom and labs-arithmetic exact resource counts; trotter/qrom failed via all-recon DNF incl. hunting the hidden verifier, arithmetic failed on merit: wrote a full 6-operator implementation, counts graded 0.1667 functional, $8.58). NOTE the concentration: 3 of 5 are pennylane labs, sharing the convention-dense vein; they are independent algorithms with independently validated grading, but future rotation should diversify repos. What does NOT work (all solved by Fable-low): spec-derivable outputs however deep the domain (mypy x2, sympy conjugate, vf2pp, lineage, 4 resolver spares, 5 behavioral batch-6), canonical algorithms even when seeded (random_walk, dropped), and any task whose graded convention is visible in-repo (ground-eigenvects). Framework precedent alone does NOT rescue the model (qrom failed despite LabsQROM in the same file). See memory what-trips-frontier-models.
